name: LayerZero
description: LayerZero is an omnichain interoperability protocol. Users of cross-chain applications built on LayerZero may qualify for airdrops.
requirements: Use LayerZero-powered apps (Stargate, Aptos Bridge, etc.)
Bridge between at least 3 different chains
Maintain some liquidity in Stargate Finance

steps.title: Use Stargate Finance
steps.description: Stargate is the main dApp built on LayerZero. Bridge stablecoins between chains (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, etc.).

steps.title: Bridge between multiple chains
steps.description: Use Stargate to bridge USDC/USDT between at least 3-4 different networks. Each bridge counts as LayerZero usage.
steps.tips: Bridge smaller amounts multiple times rather than one large transaction

steps.title: Provide liquidity on Stargate
steps.description: Add liquidity to Stargate pools to earn fees and boost your airdrop eligibility. Even small amounts help.

steps.title: Use other LayerZero apps
steps.description: Explore other dApps: Aptos Bridge, Bitcoin.com Bridge, Radiant Capital (cross-chain lending).

risks: Multiple bridge fees add up quickly
Cross-chain bridges have smart contract risk
Competition is high - need to stand out

name: Starknet
description: Starknet is a Layer 2 scaling solution for Ethereum using ZK-rollup technology. Active users may qualify for future token distributions.
requirements: Complete at least 5 transactions on different dApps
Interact with DeFi protocols (swap, provide liquidity)

steps.title: Set up Argent X or Braavos wallet
steps.description: Download the browser extension and create a new Starknet wallet. Save your seed phrase securely.

steps.title: Bridge ETH to Starknet
steps.description: Use the official Starknet bridge to transfer ETH from Ethereum mainnet. Minimum recommended: 0.01 ETH to cover gas fees.

steps.title: Interact with DeFi protocols
steps.description: Use your bridged ETH to interact with multiple protocols. Recommended: JediSwap (swap), mySwap (liquidity), Starknet ID (mint domain).

steps.title: Maintain activity for 30+ days
steps.description: Make weekly transactions to show consistent usage. Ideas: swap small amounts, vote on governance proposals if available.
steps.tips: Set a calendar reminder to do 1-2 transactions per week

risks: Gas fees can add up (budget $50-100 total)

latestSignal.title: Endur and the Liquid Staking LayerTrading remains one of crypto’s most enduring use cases, and many ecosystem that try to scale trading eventually runs into the same bottleneck: liquidity…February 11, 2026

name: zkSync Era
description: zkSync Era is a ZK-rollup Layer 2 scaling solution. Users who bridge and use the network may qualify for future token airdrops.
requirements: Optional: Add liquidity or use zkSync Paymaster

steps.title: Add zkSync Era to MetaMask
steps.description: Add the zkSync Era network to your MetaMask wallet using the official bridge site.

steps.title: Bridge assets to zkSync Era
steps.description: Bridge ETH or stablecoins from Ethereum mainnet. Minimum: 0.01 ETH recommended.

steps.title: Use multiple dApps
steps.description: Interact with SyncSwap (DEX), Mute.io (liquidity), zkSync Name Service (mint .zk domain).

steps.title: Accumulate transaction volume
steps.description: Aim for 10-20 transactions spread over multiple weeks. Diverse activity (swaps, liquidity, NFT minting) is better than repetitive actions.
steps.tips: Small transactions count - you don't need to use large amounts

risks: Network still in early stage - potential bugs
Sybil detection may filter out farmers

name: Linea
description: Linea has recent official activity that may indicate points, incentives, quests, or ecosystem participation worth monitoring for future rewards.
requirements: Read the latest official announcement carefully
Complete only the tasks explicitly promoted on the official site
Track wallet activity over multiple weeks if the campaign is ongoing

Monitor the source article: Yield Boost is ActivatedIn the crypto industry, launching an ecosystem invariably hits the same critical bottleneck: liquidity. It is the lifeblood of any blockchain. Without it, there is no volume, slippage runs high, and the user experience degrades.
March 30, 2026

steps.title: Review the latest Linea update
steps.description: Start from the latest official signal we detected and verify whether the team is running points, quests, incentives, testnet, or ecosystem activity.

steps.title: Complete the currently promoted actions
steps.description: Prioritize the official activities linked by Linea: quests, bridging, swaps, staking, points, or ecosystem tasks mentioned in the official update.
steps.tips: Record every wallet action and only use the official links from the project announcement.

steps.title: Return weekly and monitor new official announcements
steps.description: This auto-generated entry should be reviewed manually. Keep monitoring the project for snapshot, season, reward, and eligibility signals.

risks: Campaign rules may change without notice
Always verify the domain and avoid unofficial links
